title: Gaming
summary: Arcium brings "hidden-information" mechanics natively on-chain. Games that rely on concealed states (like poker hands, blackjack, or fog-of-war strategy games) can now be played fully decentralized without other players being able to peek at the raw blockchain state to cheat.
description: The Gaming ecosystem built on Arcium.

bodySections.title: Why confidentiality matters in gaming
bodySections.body: Many games rely on hidden information to remain fair, suspenseful, or strategically interesting. Transparent state can break those mechanics the moment too much is revealed to players or observers.

bodySections.title: What to look for in Arcium-native gaming
bodySections.body: Look for games where hidden state is central to the experience, not decorative: private cards, concealed intentions, fog-of-war, or protected strategy that transparent execution would compromise.
